prepLane.blockerDetail: This language has a prepared draft lane and dashboard manifest, but translation, pronunciation, audio posture, localized search copy, and the required UX/localization review before runtime promotion are still incomplete.
prepLane.nextStep: Continue the prep lane: confirm the shared traveler baseline, fill translation and pronunciation in phrase-source.csv, decide audio posture, add localized search copy, then pause for UX/localization review before any runtime wiring.

contractNotes.hardBlockSummaryRule: ops/apps/*.json stores hardBlock as a compact summary only. Exact evidence and the durable outcome of human-only actions stay in docs/operations/*. Active hardBlock entries must include system, detail, and nextHumanAction; inactive entries must clear those string fields. Human-only pauses use blockerTag=blocked:human; build-environment failures use blockerTag=blocked:validation with hardBlock.type=build-environment.
contractNotes.testingEvidenceRule: testingGates.*.evidenceRef points to the operational evidence surface. Pending or passed testing gates must carry a non-empty evidenceRef. The manifest does not replace validation logs or blocker notes.
contractNotes.manualTestingRule: For runtime variants, previewBuild, previewInstall, runtimeManualSmoke, and deviceWalkthrough summarize the current active manual-device checkpoint for the current priority rollout. Pending previewInstall, runtimeManualSmoke, or deviceWalkthrough values are allowed when a released app still carries active rollout debt or another human-gated pause. stage=release-ready and releaseStatus values of submission-ready or submitted require the current rollout manual-device gates to be satisfied and their evidence captured in docs/operations/*.
contractNotes.rolloutScopeRule: v1 manifest testingGates summarize only the current active shared rollout priority. Keep pendingFeatureRollouts to at most one active shared feature in ops/apps/*.json; if more than one shared rollout is active, track exact per-feature state in docs/operations/* and summarize only the current priority in the manifest.
contractNotes.releaseReadyRule: stage=release-ready and releaseStatus values of submission-ready or submitted require runtimeManualSmoke=passed and deviceWalkthrough=passed. Pending preview-install or device-only follow-up must use blockerTag=blocked:human plus hardBlock.active=true.
contractNotes.terminalRule: An app is terminal only when stage=live, releaseStatus=live, runtimeManualSmoke=passed, deviceWalkthrough=passed, pendingFeatureRollouts is empty, featureIntakeStatus=frozen, and hardBlock.active=false.
contractNotes.startupSurfaceRule: Broad manual repo sessions start from AGENTS.md, docs/DECISIONS.md, docs/PRIORITIES.md, and docs/operations/README.md. Queue automation runs start from AGENTS.md plus the repo-local .agent queue docs. Compatibility files such as docs/START_SESSION.md, docs/CURRENT_STATE.md, and docs/NEXT_STEPS.md may exist only as redirect stubs and must not become duplicate workflow authorities.

legacyMappings.note: Operational docs may keep the preview-built term.
Use nextStep and blockerDetail to preserve the human-facing resume point.
Operational docs may still describe the richer preview-installed phrase.
The coarse stage stays testing until release-ready or live.
Use hardBlock only when a human or external dependency is the active stop.
